title: phyllorkis lupulina
intro: Phyllorkis lupulina, also known as the Mysore thorn or the orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phyllorkis lupulina include its ability to treat various health issues such as skin conditions, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
